workstreams.scope: Select and formalize the OS-disk snapshot-and-recreation rollback strategy and canonical OS-disk naming in repository contracts, validation, tests, review documentation, and project coordination state only. Permitted paths: infra/replacement/collector-replacement-contract.json, infra/replacement/validate_execution_design.py, infra/tests/test_collector_replacement_execution_design.py, docs/designs/collector-replacement-execution.md, docs/reviews/collector-replacement-rollback-decision-2026-07-21.md, .project/active-work.json, and .project/handoffs/current-state.md. Protected paths: .github/workflows/**, infra/modules/**, application source, credentials, and Azure mutation scripts.
workstreams.next_gate: Run fresh exact-head CI for the recovery-review remediation, then return the passing exact head for independent operations-and-recovery re-review while PR #27 remains draft.

known_open_pull_requests.title: Select snapshot-based collector rollback strategy

operations_and_recovery.remediation_claim: The four requested changes are encoded in the contract, validator, negative tests, design, and review record. This claim requires fresh exact-head CI and independent re-review.
addressed_findings: quiesce, flush, checkpoint, and deallocate the source before snapshots; bind both snapshots to the same maintenance correlation and checkpoint
prove exact-snapshot Trusted Launch bootability in an isolated rehearsal before old-compute deletion without production attachments
separate snapshot-to-disk Copy from specialized-disk-to-VM Attach and validate complete recreation metadata
require and re-read NIC and evidence-disk deleteOption Detach on replacement and rollback VM contracts
verification: validator enforces phase ordering, exact snapshot identity, Copy and Attach semantics, metadata, and Detach preservation
focused tests reject pre-boundary snapshots, missing checkpoint binding, non-exact rehearsal sources, production rehearsal attachments, FromImage, missing Attach, metadata drift, and Delete semantics

conditions: fresh authenticated subscription-specific meter, SKU-availability, and quota preflight before any execution
stop and obtain renewed cost approval if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 4
unconditional stop if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 10
cleanup owner and deadline must be approved before any temporary resource is created
azure_cost.claim_boundary: Planning feasibility only; this is not an actual-cost observation, subscription-specific quotation, budget approval, or Azure execution authorization.
